description: Bearer CLI is a static application security testing (SAST) tool that scans your source code and analyzes your data flows to discover, filter and prioritize security and privacy risks.
name: bearer

indicators.Security: measures Security by performing static analysis and data flow tracking to identify vulnerabilities, exposed secrets, and privacy risks (e.g., improper handling of sensitive data), prioritizing findings based on severity and impact, and providing actionable remediation guidance.

useCases: Scan multi-language codebases in CI/CD pipelines to detect security and privacy risks before deployment
Identify and prevent leakage of sensitive data such as API keys, credentials, or personal information
Analyze data flows to ensure compliance with data protection and privacy requirements
Prioritize and remediate high-impact vulnerabilities in complex applications across multiple programming languages
